title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Researchers at the University of Cambridge use AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to understand bacterial resistance mechanisms and accelerate antibiotic discovery. The approach compresses years of structural biology analysis into minutes, addressing the challenge of antimicrobial resistance.
